items.promptRawJa: Quelle est la vitesse maximale autorisée lors du franchissement d'un virage dangereux ?
items.promptGlossEn: What is the maximum speed allowed when passing through a dangerous curve?
items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Valid MCQ asking maximum speed through a dangerous curve (explicitly 30 km/h, source option C). No existing candidate clearly matches this exact context (top candidate refers to railway crossing), so create new question and map answer to source C. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0382 concerns railway crossing (different context) despite sharing numeric answer; therefore not appropriate to approve.
